title: Preparing 10X Genomics CytAssist FFPE Sections
description: {"blocks":[{"key":"aa645","text":"Designing and properly mounting FFPE sections on large-window CytAssist slides is important for downstream analysis and data quality. This protocol describes the key steps for this preparation. ","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":{}}],"entityMap":{}}
steps: Clean the surface of the bench area, microtome (HistoCore MULTICUT R, Leica), Water bath (HI1210, Leica), and tools (including forceps and blades) with 80% ethanol.
Spray RNase Zap TM (Thermo Fisher Scientific) on the surface of the bench area, instruments, and tools and leave them to completely dry before use.
Filled the Water bath with RNAse/DNAse free water and set the temperature at 40℃.
Cut FFPE sections at 6um thickness. Note: The time cost indicated for this step is for one FFPE block.
Mount sections in the center region (< 11mm x 11mm) of the poly-prep slide according to the 10X genomics analysis requirement. Note: The time cost for this step is experiment task-dependent.
Incubated mounted sections at 42°C for 3 h and dried overnight at room temperature in a desiccator.
creator: YuHong Fu
